removeRepo.confirm:
Remove {name} from DevDigest?

This only removes it from DevDigest (and its imported PRs). Nothing is deleted on GitHub, and your local clone on disk is left untouched.

featurePlaceholder.defaultBody: This screen is owned by {owner}. The app shell, routing, theming and data layer are wired — {owner} fills in the screen here.
